title: abutilon subviscosum
intro: Abutilon subviscosum, also known as the dwarf thistle mallow, is a flowering plant species within the mallow family. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been reported to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever and treating digestive issues, due to its rich content of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. Abutilon subviscosum can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is often used in Ayurvedic and traditional Chinese medicine.
